title: Replace principal photo static asset on Home page

requirements.summary: Replace the Home page principal portrait with the newly uploaded 600×600 square PNG asset while keeping the existing public asset path unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria: A new principal image is processed to a 600×600 square crop (face centered, slight headroom, head-and-shoulders framing, cropped slightly above the elbows).
The processed image is saved/updated at frontend/public/assets/generated/principal-photo.dim_600x600.png.
The Home page continues to display the principal photo correctly using the same path (/assets/generated/principal-photo.dim_600x600.png) with no layout regressions in the Welcome/Principal section.

file_operations.description: Replace the existing file with the user’s newly uploaded principal portrait, exported as a clean/sharp perfectly-square 600×600 PNG (1:1), face centered horizontally with slight natural headroom, head-and-shoulders framing, cropped slightly above the elbows. Ensure the filename and location remain exactly frontend/public/assets/generated/principal-photo.dim_600x600.png so the Home page reference continues to work without any layout or styling changes.
